full_log: Coin flip: REANIMATOR wins the die roll, goes FIRST
6. Force of Will (instant, CMC 5, free counter)
Reason: only 1 land with no cantrips to find more
Keep best 6: Monastery Mentor, Monastery Mentor, Brainstorm, Island, Preordain, Swords to Plowshares
Bottom rationale: weakest by priority (counters > creatures > cantrips > other)
